description_long: This coffee machine features a modern, rectangular design with a metallic silver body and black plastic accents. It has a transparent water reservoir on one side, marked with measurement lines, and a matching transparent glass carafe with a black handle and lid on the opposite side. The central section houses the brewing mechanism, with a black funnel-shaped filter basket above the carafe. The base includes a control panel with a power switch and indicator light, as well as a flat platform for the carafe. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a mix of metal and plastic materials, and the surfaces are mostly smooth with some matte and glossy finishes. The machine is compact, suitable for countertop use, and designed for easy access to all functional parts.
description: A compact, modern coffee machine with a silver metallic body, black accents, and transparent water reservoir and carafe. Features a central brewing section and a simple control panel at the base.
description_view_0: Side view showing the transparent water reservoir, central brewing section, and glass carafe with handle; control panel is visible at the base.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the carafe, filter basket, and the symmetrical layout of the machine; handle and spout are centered.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the carafe handle, filter basket, and water reservoir; the machine's depth and layered structure are clear.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the metallic back panel and the top of the water reservoir; minimal detail visible from this angle.
attribute_control_panel_layout: A small rectangular control panel at the base with a power switch on the left and an indicator light next to it; simple and minimalistic layout.
